property.description: Detects HTTP User-Agent strings that deviate significantly from a known baseline. Useful for identifying botnets or malicious clients.

event.description: Check if the HTTP User-Agent string is within a reasonable length.
Check if the HTTP User-Agent string contains suspicious keywords or patterns (e.g., 'bot', 'crawler', 'spider').
Check if the HTTP User-Agent string is not in a known good list.
